name: border-conflict-cell-vs-table
description: Table style provides thick red (sz=18) borders on all edges. Cell (1,0) has explicit thin blue (sz=4) tcBorders.
expected_behavior: Cell (1,0): blue sz=4 borders (cell overrides style table borders). Cell (0,0), (0,1), (1,1): no cell-level borders (inherit from style).
current_status: GAP — testing cell vs style-provided table border precedence
